summary: Tested Learn Topic Modal updates - ALL features working correctly. Overview topics are expandable with Mira's tips (Collapsible accordion), Products tab shows real products from API with prices and 'Continue to Shop' button, Services tab correctly shows 'Ask Concierge' badge only for hasService=false services, clicking badge triggers Universal Service Command which creates service desk ticket successfully.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for accessibility - not a blocker but should be fixed for screen readers

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add DialogTitle to LearnTopicModal for accessibility compliance (can use VisuallyHidden component)
seed_data_creation: N/A - Topic content is hardcoded in TOPIC_CONFIG, Products fetched from real API
context_for_next_testing_agent: LearnTopicModal has 4 tabs: Overview (expandable Collapsible topics with Mira tips), Videos (placeholder), Products (real API fetch from /api/products), Services (hasService flag determines badge visibility). Universal Service Command integration working - creates service desk ticket and navigates to /mira-os concierge page.

mocked_apis_list: Topic tips content hardcoded in TOPIC_CONFIG (not from database)

features_tested.feature: Overview tab - Expandable topics with Mira tips
features_tested.evidence: Clicking topic trigger expands accordion, shows 'Mira's Tip' in styled teal box with sparkle icon

features_tested.feature: Products tab - Real products from catalogue
features_tested.evidence: API call to /api/products returns real products with images and prices (₹377, ₹335 visible)

features_tested.feature: Products tab - Continue to Shop button
features_tested.evidence: Button with data-testid='continue-to-shop-btn' present and navigates to /shop

features_tested.feature: Services tab - hasService=true services NO badge
features_tested.evidence: 'Puppy Training Session' and 'First Vet Visit Guidance' shown without 'Ask Concierge' badge

features_tested.feature: Services tab - hasService=false services WITH badge
features_tested.evidence: 'Puppy Socialization Class' shown with 'Ask Concierge' badge

features_tested.feature: Service click with badge triggers Universal Service Command
features_tested.evidence: Console shows [USC] Request submitted successfully with ticketId, inboxId, requestId
Button with text 'Send to Concierge for More Details' visible at modal footer

features_tested.feature: Modal stays on same page (no URL navigation when opening)
features_tested.evidence: URL stays at /learn when modal opens, only changes after action clicks
